L. 100–203, title X, § 10227(b)101 Stat. 1330–417Dec. 22, 1987“(1).—In generalExcept as provided in paragraph (2) the amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall apply in the case of elections made after .December 17, 1987“(2).—ExceptionThe amendment made by subsection (a) shall not apply in the case of any election made by a corporation after , and before , if, on or before —December 17, 1987January 1, 1989December 17, 1987“(A)there was a resolution adopted by the board of directors of such corporation to make an election under subchapter S of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, or“(B)there was a ruling request with respect to the business filed with the Internal Revenue Service expressing an intent to make such an election.”

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter, an S corporation shall not be subject to the taxes imposed by this chapter.

children.heading: Computation of corporation’s taxable income
children.label: b Computation of corporation’s taxable income

children.text: the items described in section 1366(a)(1)(A) shall be separately stated,
the deductions referred to in section 703(a)(2) shall not be allowed to the corporation,
section 248 shall apply, and
section 291 shall apply if the S corporation (or any predecessor) was a C corporation for any of the 3 immediately preceding taxable years.

children.heading: Elections of the S corporation
children.label: c Elections of the S corporation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), any election affecting the computation of items derived from an S corporation shall be made by the corporation.

children.label: A
children.text: section 617 (relating to deduction and recapture of certain mining exploration expenditures), and

children.label: B
children.text: section 901 (relating to taxes of foreign countries and possessions of the United States).

children.label: A
children.text: an S corporation was a C corporation for the last taxable year before the first taxable year for which the election under section 1362(a) was effective, and

children.label: B
children.text: the corporation inventoried goods under the LIFO method for such last taxable year,

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any increase in the tax imposed by this chapter by reason of this subsection shall be payable in 4 equal installments.

children.heading: Date for payment of installments
children.label: B Date for payment of installments
children.text: The first installment under subparagraph (A) shall be paid on or before the due date (determined without regard to extensions) for the return of the tax imposed by this chapter for the last taxable year for which the corporation was a C corporation and the 3 succeeding installments shall be paid on or before the due date (as so determined) for the corporation’s return for the 3 succeeding taxable years.

children.heading: No interest for period of extension
children.label: C No interest for period of extension
children.text: Notwithstanding section 6601(b), for purposes of section 6601, the date prescribed for the payment of each installment under this paragraph shall be determined under this paragraph.

children.label: A
children.text: the inventory amount of the inventory asset under the first-in, first-out method authorized by section 471, exceeds

children.label: B
children.text: the inventory amount of such assets under the LIFO method.

children.heading: LIFO method
children.label: A LIFO method
children.text: The term “LIFO method” means the method authorized by section 472.

children.heading: Inventory assets
children.label: B Inventory assets
children.text: The term “inventory assets” means stock in trade of the corporation, or other property of a kind which would properly be included in the inventory of the corporation if on hand at the close of the taxable year.

children.heading: Method of determining inventory amount
children.label: C Method of determining inventory amount
i
children.text: if the corporation uses the retail method of valuing inventories under section 472, by using such method, or

children.label: ii
children.text: if clause (i) does not apply, by using cost or market, whichever is lower.

children.heading: Not treated as member of affiliated group
children.label: D Not treated as member of affiliated group
children.text: Except as provided in regulations, the corporation referred to in paragraph (1) shall not be treated as a member of an affiliated group with respect to the amount included in gross income under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 5 Special rule
children.text: Sections 1367(a)(2)(D) and 1371(c)(1) shall not apply with respect to any increase in the tax imposed by reason of this subsection.
